titleStmt.title: SII 5.1356: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1356. (A.R. No. 401 of 1896). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭit teṉṉavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulaitara vikkalar ciṅka
ṇar melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittuṉ taṉ cakkara naṭātti virasi ṅṅāsa nattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyaāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kovirāja k(o)ciripanmarāṉa muṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade
varkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu nāḷ Iruṉuṟṟuttoṇṇūṟu Atikārikaḷ rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭup poy(k)kaināṭṭu periyapākakattuk kuḷamuḻār Eṟaṉ kūttanārāṉa rāja
rājamuven=ta veḷār jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻalnāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyar tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyar koyilil rājarājaṉmaṇṭapattuk koyiṟkarumam Ārāyaāvirun tu Itevar teva
tāṉamāṉa Ūrkaḷ kaṇakku keṭṭup puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu maṇikkaṅkaip pākutevar kaṇakkiṉpaṭi muṉpu niman=ta ñ ceytapaṭi poṉ paṉnirukaḻañciṉmel Eṟṟam Iṟuttu varukiṟa poṉnirukaḻañcey Eḻumañcāṭiyiṉāl poṉ kaḻañcukku kācu muṉṟe Aṟumāvāka kā
cu nāṟpatum Iṉnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr nilattu yāṇṭu Eḻāvatumuta leṟiṉa rājarājapaperun=te ruvil cāliyar yāṇṭu Eḻāvatumutal Iṟukka niccayitta kācu Aṟupatum Uṭaiyār koyilil kālaḷappār kālaḷavu pāṭṭattukku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatuvaraiyum tevarpaṇṭārattu vaittu
vārāmaiyil kālaḷavupāṭṭattukku yāṇṭeḻāvatu mutal vaikka niccayitta kācu Irupattu Añcum Āka kācu nūṟṟirupattaiñcu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār virarājen=ti raṉ tiruppaḷḷieḻuccikku veṇṭum niman=ta ṅkaḷukku niman=ta ñ ceytu kuṭukkaveṉṟu Atikārikaḷ Irājairājamuven=ta ve
ḷār Evap puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇakku Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattup pālaiyūrnāṭṭu Iraājentra coḻanallūr pālaiyūrkiḻavaṉ kampaṉ cilamaiyaṉum śrīkāricoḻamaṇṭalattu kṣattri yacikāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu koṟṟamaṅkalattu koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ cirāḷaṉ kaṇṭarāccanāna Irumaṭicoḻattirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu viḻupparaiya
num maṭamuṭai caturānanapaṇṭitarum kaṇakku tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya(ṉ) nārāyaṇacāṉum Irun tu niman=ta ñaceytapaṭi .
Digital edition of SII 5.1356 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
